angle: Cross-check _routes.yaml mcp_tools against per-command allowed-tools to find routes that reference tools the parent command doesn't actually allow

title: Causal-graph route names memory_causal_unlink outside parent allowed-tools
evidence: forbidden_targets includes '- memory_causal_unlink'; parent command .opencode/commands/doctor/speckit.md:4 allowed-tools lists memory_causal_link but not memory_causal_unlink.
fix: Either add mcp__mk_spec_memory__memory_causal_unlink to doctor/speckit.md allowed-tools or replace the literal tool-name reference in doctor_causal-graph.yaml with a generic prohibition.

title: Causal-graph asset references memory_causal_link omitted from route mcp_tools
evidence: Phase 1 activities include '- Never call memory_causal_link in diagnostic mode.', but _routes.yaml causal-graph mcp_tools (lines 66-69) omits mcp__mk_spec_memory__memory_causal_link while the parent command allows it.
fix: Add mcp__mk_spec_memory__memory_causal_link to the causal-graph route mcp_tools in _routes.yaml.
